anti_goal_effects: AG-PERF-CLAIM: current CKR metric set is incomplete
AG-BENCHMARK-BRANCH: established-row regression read remains pending
contribution_reviews.objective_contribution: It is the direct performance contribution required by the frame, but its stored metrics name only the two geometric means and omit the frozen per-row allocation ceiling, retained and cleanup walls, and established-row regression gate.
contribution_reviews.problem_now: Prove the session-kernel release improves representative lifecycle throughput and allocation while every performance and behavior wall holds.
contribution_reviews.simpler_alternative: Keep one CKR, but make its metric set exactly mirror the frozen performance part of the frame instead of relying on prose for the row and wall gates.

anti_goal_effects: AG-INTEGRITY: held by refusing partial attribution
AG-PERF-CLAIM: remains blocked because cause is unknown
AG-PRESERVATION: immutable P2 observations stayed unchanged
contribution_reviews.objective_contribution: It proved the frozen profiles cannot support complete attribution because four profiles omit sampled nodeIds covering 36 samples and 283064 bytes; it did not locate a candidate component.
contribution_reviews.problem_now: Attribute the accepted P2 allocation deltas to complete normalized stacks without inventing missing evidence.
contribution_reviews.simpler_alternative: Preserve the replayable-empty checkpoint and remove this DKR from the active spine; any new capture method is a separate DKR.

anti_goal_effects: AG-ALLOCATION-REGRESSION: exact full candidate is breached
AG-INDEPENDENCE: source map still needs independent acceptance
contribution_reviews.objective_contribution: Its source map correctly establishes the 2/3/5 context trees, all seven candidate materialization counts, four build-separable groups, and the boundary that source ranking is not performance evidence.
contribution_reviews.problem_now: Reduce the full candidate into source-separable components that can explain the managed and SDK allocation regressions.
contribution_reviews.simpler_alternative: Retain the accepted source map, but replace the four-atomic-variant route with one staged full-minus-V4 ablation; only descend again if that result leaves the cause open.

anti_goal_effects: AG-ALLOCATION-REGRESSION: breached managed and SDK ceilings
AG-CLEANUP-EFFECT: held in the accepted comparison
contribution_reviews.objective_contribution: It produced a one-file candidate and passed semantic gates, but the exact candidate failed the frozen performance target and cannot contribute as the release candidate.
contribution_reviews.problem_now: Produce one semantically valid lazy-state candidate for direct paired measurement.
contribution_reviews.simpler_alternative: Preserve the semantic-gate evidence and candidate diff as discovery input, but remove PKR-P1 from the active delivery spine.

anti_goal_effects: AG-INDEPENDENCE: held by deterministic validator replay
AG-BENCHMARK-BRANCH: established 47-row benchmark remains not run and blocks terminal performance success
contribution_reviews.objective_contribution: It supplied the direct independently replayed metric read that rejects the candidate and prevents a false release-readiness claim. Its execution is complete and must not be favorably rerun.
contribution_reviews.problem_now: Read the exact candidate against the frozen lifecycle performance target and walls.
contribution_reviews.simpler_alternative: Keep the immutable rejection as evidence and remove the finished PKR from the active spine; future observations belong to a reducing DKR with a new frozen composition.

hypotheses.narrowing_toward_wrong_tip: yes (.okra/runs/release-readiness-20260716/artifacts/reject-pkr-p2.v1.json: throughput geometric mean 1.0487701891470118 < 1.10, allocation geometric mean 0.9450922673611655 > 0.90, managed allocation 1.065984527077614 > 1.05, SDK allocation 1.0960133932263103 > 1.05)
hypotheses.proposed_next: Decommission the full candidate as a target-satisfying hypothesis while preserving its semantic and failed-measurement artifacts. Do not rerun the same candidate.
hypotheses.statement: The full lazy-state candidate can meet the frozen performance target.
hypotheses.verdict_evidence: .okra/runs/release-readiness-20260716/artifacts/reject-pkr-p2.v1.json accepted the independent replay and rejected the exact full candidate against the frozen target; ledger.jsonl#seq=50 record_hash=1db3acd348ac0c973bf6ecfffe30771cbf5a1759d1b9ea04ec33b406f2aba126 records the per-row allocation regression.

hypotheses.narrowing_toward_wrong_tip: yes (.okra/runs/release-readiness-20260716/workers/dkr-p11b-component-lifecycle-map/progress.jsonl#seq=1 ranks V4 only from source and proposes four full measurements, while .okra/runs/release-readiness-20260716/artifacts/reject-pkr-p2.v1.json requires the smallest route back to the frozen target)
hypotheses.proposed_next: Re-aim evidence package for the human. Proposed single reducing DKR: compare exact baseline with the exact V1+V2+V3 composition under the frozen protocol. If it fails, hand back before funding more variants; if it holds, independently validate before any PKR.
hypotheses.statement: Measuring the four DKR-P11B separable variants is the smallest defensible next route.

variant_separability_review.V1-seedTags-only: build-separable by replacing only seedTags; no lifecycle field depends on it
variant_separability_review.V2-never-used-resource-observers: build-separable by making only resourceListeners and resourceControllers optional and changing their direct access sites
variant_separability_review.V3-resource-ownership-only: build-separable by making only resources optional and changing find, create, release, structured-close, and cleanup access sites
variant_separability_review.V4-structured-execution-ownership: build-separable by making cleanups, descendants, activeIterators, and children optional and changing their direct access sites; shared methods contain line-separable accesses
variant_separability_review.interaction_limit: Four baseline-versus-atomic measurements estimate isolated main effects only. They do not show whether combinations cause the full-candidate regression.

hypotheses.verdict_evidence: The 2/3/5 context trees, all seven materialization counts, and four-way build separability hold. The 'smallest' claim does not: one full-minus-V4 ablation directly tests whether the lower-risk V1+V2+V3 composition removes the managed and SDK regressions while retaining the scope gain. Four atomic measurements cost more and cannot expose interactions. V4's stronger divergence rank remains a source hypothesis because no variant has been observed.

payload.objective_from_frame: Bring PR 346 to release-readiness with release_readiness_gap_count == 0, including throughput geometric mean >= 1.10, allocation geometric mean <= 0.90, every allocation row <= 1.05, retained and cleanup walls held, and established-row regressions == 0.
payload.required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.

socratic_questions.question: If V1+V2+V3 together meet the frozen target without V4, what steering value would four isolated main-effect measurements add before that direct composition read?
If all four atomic variants look safe but the full candidate regresses, where does the proposed design measure the interaction?

payload.summary: 0 intact, 1 drifted, 1 dead; drifted: H2; dead: H1
payload.workspace_effect: Read-only challenge plus this helper-governed worker progress record. No product, frame, metric, target, variant, build, commit, push, merge, release, publish, or deploy change.
